author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Root cause: portable_pty's spawn path on the macOS CI runner rejects /bin/true with ENOENT, even though the file exists. The test_spawn_echo_completes_with_exit_zero test succeeds because it goes through /bin/sh -c. Fix: replace /bin/true with /bin/sh -c ':' to match the working test's pattern and sidestep the runner edge case.
